blended.narrative: Bluewood is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,364 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 45.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 51".
